messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] International finance
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

Does anyone have any ideas on ways to incorporate R (e.g., lectures,
homework, projects) into a course on international finance at the graduate
level?

Thank you.

Geoff

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
